image.title: NAN Carey, N Alkhamees, A Cox, M Sund-Levander, P Tingström, F Mold

item.title: Exploring views and experiences of how infections are detected and managed in practice by nurses, care workers and manager's in nursing homes in England and Sweden: a survey protocol.
